name: Mag Magna Corp
business: Mag Magna Corp sells poultry farming consulting services and an AI-powered Poultry Wellness Guide API subscription. The consulting services cover areas such as optimization, antibiotic-free transitions, and sustainability. The API provides breed-specific disease diagnosis and management recommendations.

exposures.sentence: The Poultry Wellness Guide API is an AI-powered tool designed to assist in diagnosing and managing chicken diseases based on breed and symptoms, offering expert recommendations for prevention and treatment.
